performer.vault_description: Manage your high-fidelity act reels, music, and professional assets.

booking.accept_agreement: I have reviewed the performance cues and confirm my technical team can execute them.

legal.safety_exit_summary: Performer retains 100% payout if exiting due to verified safety threats.
legal.asf_clause_description: Performer and Seeker represent and warrant that they are not members of or associated with Anti-Social Forces (Yakuza). Immediate contract termination applies for any breach.
legal.escrow_info: Funds are held in escrow and released 48h after the show.

home.hero_badge: THE GLOBAL STANDARD FOR DRAG EXCELLENCE
home.hero_title_italic: SO IS YOUR CROWN - EARN IT.
home.hero_description: Scale your empire across 18 international markets with the platform built for prestige. Manage bookings, assets, and media kits with a industry-disrupting 0.3% margin.
home.commission_desc: We only succeed when you do. Our 0.3% margin is the lowest in the entertainment industry, ensuring maximum revenue stays where it belongs: with the artists and venues.
home.profiles_desc: Cinematic media kits, technical riders, and verified credentials designed for the world's most prestigious stages.

academy.hero_description: Stop guessing, start mastering. The definitive educational resources for the modern professional performer.
academy.no_modules: No modules found in this track.
academy.cert_description: This cryptographically signed document verifies that the performer meets the global professional standards of the DRAGDEM platform.
academy.curriculum_mastery: has successfully mastered the Institutional Pro curriculum, demonstrating advanced proficiency in global tax compliance, contractual safety, multi-currency logistics, and professional DEI standards.
